title: 5 Star Soccer
short_description: A retro football-themed roguelite deckbuilder with turn-based 5-a-side strategy action.
description:
5 Star Soccer is a retro football themed Roguelite Deckbuilder. Players progress along a series of matches taking on increasingly more challenging opponents in 5-a-side turn based strategy action.

Battle your way along the tower mode, upgrade your players with items purchased at the shop, take on tougher opponents!
